title: The Fake Crew Is Exposed
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Fake Straw Hat Pirates, Fake Luffy, Marines, Rayleigh, Luffy. The core story beat is the fake crew is exposed.
scene: The scene centers on the fake crew is exposed, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Fake Straw Hat Pirates, Fake Luffy, Marines, Rayleigh, Luffy driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: THEY'RE ONTO US!! RUN FOR IT!! WE'LL BE KILLED!!

dialogue.speaker: Fake Luffy
dialogue.text: The hell?! Those dirty crooks!!! They used the name of straw hat Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...to play us all for fools?! taking advantage of the real straw hat's death?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ugh!! That worthless Little 26- Million scumbag...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to think he almost had me working for him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?? He was pretending to be me??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That zero and Sanji, too? wow... I thought they seemed different, but they sure do look similar!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The deceivers may be fools, but it's over for you lot who were deceived as well!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Every one of you is under arrest!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and what's more, by some crazy coincidence, it looks like the real straw hat is on this island as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The PX-S detected him as soon as he entered the archipelago!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All my precious food is in this bag, you know!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: EAD OR ALLY ON KEYID IN 100,000.**

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's the face from the wanted poster!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aghhh!! That guy was the real...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is the man we came for!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you're gonna get in my way again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm not meant to cause any trouble, it might get in the way of our departure...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: departure?! Oh, you're not going anywhere!

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: I'm not the same man I was two years ago... I've become a full- fledged Marine Soldier!! I'm going to capture you here and now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I get the feeling this won't be the last I see of you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy!! I knew it!! Why is it that whenever there's trouble, you're always right in the middle of it?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ZORO!! Sanji!! Whoa!! This time it really is you!!

summary: The Fake Crew Is Exposed. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
